# Search Movies and TV Shows

> A web app to search for movies and TV shows and find out where to stream them.

Search Movies and TV Shows lets visitors look up movies and TV shows and see which
streaming services carry them, using data from [TMDB](https://www.themoviedb.org/)
and [JustWatch](https://www.justwatch.com/).

## Pages

- [Home](https://movie-search-app.fly.dev/): Search movies and TV shows.
- [Movies](https://movie-search-app.fly.dev/movies): Browse and search movies.
- [TV Shows](https://movie-search-app.fly.dev/tv-shows): Browse and search TV shows.
